subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants of the divine Threshold! Your letter was received, but the reply must needs be brief, for time is pressing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده آستان الهی نامه شما رسید ولی جواب مختصر تحریر میگردد زیرا فرصت
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
